content_body: This cabin was excellent in every way—beautiful furnishings, spacious living area, and a large kitchen equipped with all you would need. Everything was clean and well taken care of. All the bedrooms are nicely decorated, have comfortable beds, and each has its own bathroom. The gas fireplaces on the main and terrace level gave much welcome warmth, and the back deck's wood fireplace was very much enjoyed. Also, the view of the Toccoa River from the back deck was beautiful!!! Upon arrival, we walked in to peaceful music playing from the main floor TV and lovely Christmas decor throughout the house. It was very warm and welcoming. This was our family's first time getting away together for the Christmas holiday, and our stay here met—but also exceeded—our expectations! We left refreshed and relaxed and took home great memories! Thanks for opening your home!!!
title: Excellent in Every Way
